minor_animal_pen.name: Animal Pen
minor_animal_pen.text: Your house can hold 1 additional pet.

minor_basket.name: Basket
minor_basket.text: Each time you use the "Reed Bank" accumulation space, you also get 1 food.

minor_beanfield.name: Beanfield
minor_beanfield.text: This card is a field that can only grow vegetables.

minor_bread_paddle.name: Bread Paddle
minor_bread_paddle.text: Each time you bake bread, you get 1 additional food.

minor_butter_churn.name: Butter Churn
minor_butter_churn.text: In the field phase of each harvest, you get 1 food for every 3 sheep and 1 food for every 2 cattle you have.

minor_canoe.name: Canoe
minor_canoe.text: Each time you use the "Fishing" accumulation space, you also get 1 food and 1 reed.

minor_caravan.name: Caravan
minor_caravan.text: This card provides room for 1 person.

minor_clay_deposit.name: Clay Deposit
minor_clay_deposit.text: When you play this card, you immediately get 3 clay.

minor_clay_shovel.name: Clay Shovel
minor_clay_shovel.text: Each time you use the "Clay Pit" or "Hollow" accumulation space, you get 1 additional clay.

minor_corn_scoop.name: Corn Scoop
minor_corn_scoop.text: Each time you use the "Grain Seeds" action space, you get 1 additional grain.

minor_drinking_trough.name: Drinking Trough
minor_drinking_trough.text: Each of your pastures (with or without a stable) can hold 2 more animals.

minor_fish_trap.name: Fish Trap
minor_fish_trap.text: Each time you use the "Fishing" accumulation space, you also get 1 food.

minor_harvest_totem.name: Harvest Totem
minor_harvest_totem.text: Each time you play an occupation, you get 1 wild boar.

minor_herb_patch.name: Herb Patch
minor_herb_patch.text: This card is a field that can only grow grain.

minor_hermits_stick.name: Hermit's Stick
minor_hermits_stick.text: At the end of the game, you get 1/2/4 bonus points for having exactly 4/3/2 family members.

minor_lasso.name: Lasso
minor_lasso.text: You can place exactly two people immediately after one another if at least one of them uses the "Sheep Market", "Pig Market", or "Cattle Market" accumulation space.

minor_loom.name: Loom
minor_loom.text: In the field phase of each harvest, if you have at least 1/4/7 sheep, you get 1/2/3 food. During scoring, you get 1 bonus point for every 3 sheep.

minor_manger.name: Manger
minor_manger.text: During scoring, if your pastures cover at least 6/7/8/10 farmyard spaces, you get 1/2/3/4 bonus points.

minor_market_stall.name: Market Stall
minor_market_stall.text: When you play this card, you immediately get 1 vegetable. Then pass this card to the player on your left, who adds it to their hand.

minor_milk_jug.name: Milk Jug
minor_milk_jug.text: Each time ANY player uses the "Cattle Market" accumulation space, you get 2 food.

minor_mining_hammer.name: Mining Hammer
minor_mining_hammer.text: When you play this card, you immediately get 1 food. Each time you renovate, you can also build 1 stable without paying wood.

minor_pond_hut.name: Pond Hut
minor_pond_hut.text: When you play this card, place 1 food on each of the next 3 round spaces. At the start of these rounds, you get the food.

minor_private_forest.name: Private Forest
minor_private_forest.text: When you play this card, place 1 wood on each of the next 5 round spaces. At the start of these rounds, you get the wood.

minor_quarry_cart.name: Quarry Cart
minor_quarry_cart.text: Each time you use the "Western Quarry" or "Eastern Quarry" accumulation space, you get 1 additional stone.

minor_sack_cart.name: Sack Cart
minor_sack_cart.text: When you play this card, place 1 grain on each of the remaining round spaces for rounds 5, 8, 11, and 14.

minor_scythe.name: Scythe
minor_scythe.text: In the field phase of each harvest, if you have at least 2 grain fields, you get 1 additional grain.

minor_seed_drill.name: Seed Drill
minor_seed_drill.text: Each time you sow, the first grain field you sow gets 1 additional grain on it.

minor_seed_pouch.name: Seed Pouch
minor_seed_pouch.text: When you play this card, you immediately get 1 grain and 1 vegetable.

minor_shepherds_crook.name: Shepherd's Crook
minor_shepherds_crook.text: Each time you fence a new pasture covering at least 4 farmyard spaces, you immediately get 2 sheep.

minor_shifting_cultivation.name: Shifting Cultivation
minor_shifting_cultivation.text: When you play this card, immediately plow 1 field. Then pass this card to the player on your left, who adds it to their hand.

minor_threshing_board.name: Threshing Board
minor_threshing_board.text: Each time you use the "Farmland" or "Cultivation" action space, you also get a "Bake Bread" action.

minor_wool_blankets.name: Wool Blankets
minor_wool_blankets.text: During scoring, you get 2 bonus points if you live in a wooden house with at least 3 rooms.

occ_animal_tamer.name: Animal Tamer
occ_animal_tamer.text: Instead of just 1 animal total, you can keep 1 animal in each room of your house.

occ_baker.name: Baker
occ_baker.text: Each time you bake bread, you get 1 additional food per grain baked.

occ_braggart.name: Braggart
occ_braggart.text: During scoring, you get 2/3/4/5/7/9 bonus points for having at least 5/6/7/8/9/10 improvements in front of you.

occ_carpenter.name: Carpenter
occ_carpenter.text: Each new room costs you only 3 of the appropriate building resource (and 2 reed).

occ_cattle_feeder.name: Cattle Feeder
occ_cattle_feeder.text: Each time you take cattle from an action space, you get 1 additional cattle.

occ_clay_digger.name: Clay Digger
occ_clay_digger.text: Each time you take clay from an action space, you get 1 additional clay.

occ_conjurer.name: Conjurer
occ_conjurer.text: Each time you use the "Traveling Players" accumulation space, you also get 1 wood and 1 grain.

occ_cook.name: Cook
occ_cook.text: At any time, you can convert grain to 2 food and vegetables to 3 food.

occ_deaconess.name: Deaconess
occ_deaconess.text: As long as you have exactly 2 family members, in the field phase of harvest 1/2/3/4/5/6, you get 1 wood and 1/2/3/4/5/6 food.

occ_estate_manager.name: Estate Manager
occ_estate_manager.text: At the end of the game, if no player has more animals of 1/2/3 types than you (and you have at least 1 of the type), you get 2/4/5 bonus points.

occ_firewood_collector.name: Firewood Collector
occ_firewood_collector.text: Each time you use the "Grain Seeds", "Farmland", "Grain Utilization", or "Cultivation" action space, you also get 1 wood.

occ_fisherman.name: Fisherman
occ_fisherman.text: Each time you use the "Fishing" action space, you get 2 additional food.

occ_forager.name: Forager
occ_forager.text: Each time you use the "Forest" accumulation space, you also get 1 food.

occ_grain_farmer.name: Grain Farmer
occ_grain_farmer.text: Each time you use the "Grain Seeds" action space, you get 1 additional grain.

occ_greengrocer.name: Greengrocer
occ_greengrocer.text: Each time you use the "Grain Seeds" action space, you also get 1 vegetable.

occ_hedge_keeper.name: Hedge Keeper
occ_hedge_keeper.text: Each time you build fences, up to 3 of them are free.

occ_house_steward.name: House Steward
occ_house_steward.text: If there are still 1/3/6/9 complete rounds left to play, you immediately get 1/2/3/4 wood. During scoring, each player with the most rooms gets 3 bonus points.

occ_market_crier.name: Market Crier
occ_market_crier.text: Each time you use the "Vegetable Seeds" action space, you get 1 additional vegetable.

occ_pig_breeder.name: Pig Breeder
occ_pig_breeder.text: Each time you take wild boar from an action space, you get 1 additional wild boar.

occ_quarryman.name: Quarryman
occ_quarryman.text: Each time you use the "Western Quarry" or "Eastern Quarry" accumulation space, you also get 1 food.

occ_reed_collector.name: Reed Collector
occ_reed_collector.text: Each time you take reed from an action space, you get 1 additional reed.

occ_roofer.name: Roofer
occ_roofer.text: When you renovate, you do not need to pay reed.

occ_seasonal_worker.name: Seasonal Worker
occ_seasonal_worker.text: Each time you use the "Day Laborer" action space, you also get 1 grain.

occ_shepherd.name: Shepherd
occ_shepherd.text: Each time you take sheep from an action space, you get 1 additional sheep.

occ_small_scale_farmer.name: Small-Scale Farmer
occ_small_scale_farmer.text: As long as you live in a house with exactly 2 rooms, you get 1 wood at the start of each round.

occ_stable_hand.name: Stable Hand
occ_stable_hand.text: Each time you build one or more stables, you also get 1 food per stable.

occ_stonecutter.name: Stonecutter
occ_stonecutter.text: Every room, renovation, and major improvement costs you 1 stone less.

occ_tutor.name: Tutor
occ_tutor.text: Each occupation you play after this one costs you 1 food less.

occ_water_carrier.name: Water Carrier
occ_water_carrier.text: At the start of each round, you get 1 food.

occ_woodcutter.name: Woodcutter
occ_woodcutter.text: Each time you take wood from an action space, you get 1 additional wood.
